task_completion.description: Open and read the hazmat incident report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'hazmat_incident_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Search for Chlorine or UN 1017 in CAMEO Chemicals
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser displaying the chemical datasheet or search results for Chlorine (UN 1017).

task_completion.description: Create or open the output text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open with the file name 'chlorine_emergency_response.txt' visible in the title bar or tab.

task_completion.description: Document the ERG guide number and required distances for a large spill
task_completion.visual_evidence: The output text file contains references to 'Guide 124', an initial isolation distance (e.g., 600 feet), and protective action distances (e.g., 3.5 km day / 8 km night).

task_completion.description: Document firefighting, PPE, and first aid measures
task_completion.visual_evidence: The output text file contains sections or text detailing firefighting procedures, required personal protective equipment (PPE), and first aid measures for Chlorine.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to access the database
integrity.visual_evidence: A GUI web browser (like Firefox or Chromium) is used to navigate to CAMEO Chemicals, rather than terminal commands like curl or wget.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually extracted and saved the data
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen copying/pasting or typing the information into a text editor, rather than running a pre-written script to generate the output file.

integrity.description: Verify the output file is saved in the correct directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal shows the file is being saved specifically to '/home/ga/Documents/chlorine_emergency_response.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Chemical: Chlorine. UN Number: 1017. Expected ERG Guide: 124 ('Gases - Toxic and/or Corrosive - Oxidizing'). Large spill initial isolation distance: 600 feet. Protective action distances: 3.5 km (day) and 8 km (night). Output file path: /home/ga/Documents/chlorine_emergency_response.txt.
